title: Auto synch matching names with Mirror Columns

posts.author: AAcosta3810 (Acosta)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great when setting up mirror columns to auto match already, so we don’t have to manually match them. This kind of defeats the purpose and doesn’t allow for true automation. It still requires manual intervention.

What are you trying to achieve

When creating mirror columns allow the user to auto-match text by selecting "Matches Exactly or “Contains” so we don’t have to manually select a match.

posts.author: Fortimus_Team (Fortimus)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @AAcosta3810 ,

You can try the Mirror Item Multiple Boards app.

It allows you to add the same item to multiple boards with regular columns. So you don’t need to use Mirror Columns or connect boards at all!

191920×960 210 KB

What You Can Do -

Add the SAME ITEM ON MULTIPLE BOARDS with live sync and full context

Sync UPDATES + REPLIES in real time for items and subitems

Set up automations like “When status changes to something, mirror item to target board and group”

Create a Master Board with items/subitems from multiple boards

Add a subitem from one board as a main item on another board

Keep your boards clean and connected — no Mirror Columns or Connect Boards needed

Feel free to reach out to us at support@fortimus.co for a FREE DEMO!
